violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the bar was blocked by decorations. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was not operational, handwashing sink must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment placed a service call for repair. Sanitizing moved to three bay measured chlorine at 100ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was COS. Ice machine was emptied during time of inspection. Establishment is to clean and sanitize ice machine. Establishment is to send photo of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
Reduced Oxygen packaged fish was observed thawing in an intact ROP package. Fish was observed at 41 DF. Fish was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the prep table in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

The three bay sink is lacking drain stoppers. Drain stoppers are required so establishment can effectively fill sink bays to wash, rinse, and sanitize. Individual went to purchase stoppers during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay and mechanical dishwashers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the dishwasher, and blower fans in walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2025
Water was observed leaking in the basement and draining into buckets, establishment must fix area above leak (Dish area) New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
The drainage from the three bay sink was observed leaking and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
